mapper.select: SELECT COMMUNITY_NAME_EN FROM COMMUNITY WHERE COMMUNITY_ID = #{param1}
SELECT P.POST_ID, P.USER_ID, P.POST_TEXT, P.POST_DATE, P.POST_CNT, P.POST_TITLE, T.POST_TAG_TEXT FROM POST P JOIN POST_TAG T ON P.POST_TAG_ID = T.POST_TAG_ID WHERE P.POST_ID = #{param1}
mapper.update: UPDATE POST SET POST_CNT = POST_CNT + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{param1}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_like (post_like_id, post_id, user_id) VALUES (POST_LIKE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comments (post_comments_id, post_id, user_id, post_comments_text, post_comments_date) VALUES (POST_COMMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{comments}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT post_comments_id, user_id, post_comments_text, post_comments_date FROM post_comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY post_comments_date ASC
